title: Holiday Closure Hours & Details
content:
Hi,

 

Thank you for reaching out regarding our limited hours and for choosing to spend your holiday season with us! Though services and access will be significantly limited, we will be holding an opening window from December 27–30 from 3:30 PM to 7:30 PM. Please find all details for your visit below:

 

Entry will be available through the alleyway and into the ground floor studio. Doors will remain closed throughout the day. When you arrive on site, please call/ text our concierge at 310-487-0940 and our team will let you in. 

 

The following spaces will be available for use:

  • Pilates Room

  • Main Gym Floor

  • Recovery Lounge & Bathrooms

   

Reformer Pilates classes with Miwa will be available each day at 4 and 5 PM. To request a spot in class, please reply to this email no later than December 23 with your preferred date and time. Classes will not be available for booking through the app and will be filled first come, first serve via email. Please note that we will not be on-site or monitoring email prior to December 27, and same-day class requests cannot be guaranteed due to limited capacity. 

 

Please be advised that construction will be ongoing during all open hours and noise is expected throughout your visit. 

 

We appreciate your understanding as we work through these improvements and thank you for your flexibility during this limited-service period. Please let us know if you have any questions before December 23 and we wish you the happiest of holiday seasons!

 

Best,

The Team at HUME

title: New Member Offer Follow-Up
content:
Hi X,

We're so excited to have you as part of the HUME community! It was great to meet you and share more about what we can offer you as a new member.

Complimentary Wellness Consultation:
We would love to treat you to a coffee or matcha at our rooftop café with our Director of Wellness, Jenna. Jenna can tell you more about how our offerings (training, recovery, specialists, classes, etc.) can meet your specific needs and help create an optimal program for you. To schedule your complimentary wellness consultation, click here.

Complimentary Equipment Overview:
Meet with one of our lead concierges, Dylan, to receive an overview of our machines and equipment. Dylan can walk you through our main gym floor and rooftop and recommend personal trainers based on your needs and interests. To schedule with Dylan, please click here.

$100 Personal Training Session:
Book your first personal training session with any of our amazing trainers for only $100. First sessions can be purchased here and booked through our app.

$65 Stretch & Percussive Therapy Session:
Whether you're stiff from sitting all day, recovering from strenuous workout, or just in need of relaxation, stretch therapy helps improve your flexibility, reduces tension, and supports muscle recovery. Book your first session with our therapist, Jenya, for only $65. First sessions can be purchased here and booked through our app.

Please let us know if you have any questions regarding these offers! Our concierge team is always available for questions at the desk, through email, or through call/text at 213-566-8580.

We look forward to seeing you again in the space soon!

Best,

[Your Name] & The Team at HUME

title: General Membership Info - Detailed
content:
Hi X,

Thank you for your interest in HUME and our offerings. Our membership rate is $450 per month with a one-time $500 initiation fee as well as a six-month commitment.

We also offer an annual option for $4,595, paid in full upon membership acceptance, which includes twelve months of access to the facilities and waives the initiation fee.

What's Included:
All members enjoy full access to:

- Our gym, café, and spa amenities, including 2 cold plunges, steam room, and infrared sauna
- Unlimited group classes offered Monday–Friday (6:30am–8:00pm) and weekends starting around 8:00am

Group Classes:

- Pilates: Reformer, Mat, Signature Sculpt
- Yoga: Power Vinyasa, Hatha, Primal Flow, Flow into Yin, Yoga for Runners & Cyclists, and more
- Strength & Conditioning: Circuit Strength, Speed & Agility, Core Strength
- Therapeutic & Restorative: Sound Healing, Fascia Release, Yoga Nidra, Acupressure Yin Yoga
- Breathwork & Sound Bath Healing

Recovery Services:

- Complimentary use of Hyperice Normatec recovery boots and Hypervolt percussion massage devices

Signature Treatments (additional cost):

- Acupuncture, Massage Therapy, Stretch and Percussion Therapy
- Nutrition Coaching, Hyperbaric Oxygen Chamber, Balancer Pro Body Suit Treatments

Personal Training Packages:

- 1 session: $175
- 5 sessions: $825
- 10 sessions: $1,550

If you'd like a tour, we would be happy to show you around our facilities. To schedule a tour, please click here.

And finally, if interested in membership, please complete your application here. We look forward to hearing from you soon!

Best,

The Team at HUME

title: Complaints about Pause Structure
content:
Hi X,

Thank you for sharing this thoughtful feedback. We recently launched our pause policy based on member requests, as we previously did not offer pauses for travel.

Because our billing system does not support mid-cycle adjustments, pauses cannot begin mid-cycle, nor are we able to offer customized or prorated pauses tied to specific travel dates. To ensure fairness and consistency across the membership, we apply this structure to all pause requests.

Given your timeline, we recommend keeping [make suggestion here based on their billing cycle dates]. If you return early, we are always happy to reactivate your membership right away. The $50 fee is non-refundable, as it secures your spot and current pricing throughout the pause.

We completely understand how the structure may feel limiting in your situation and appreciate you taking the time to share your perspective. Member feedback like this is always reviewed as we continue refining our policies.

Please let us know how you would like to proceed, and we are happy to help with any additional questions.

Best,

The Team at HUME

title: Holiday Closure - Refund Request
content:
Hi X,

Thank you for reaching out and for being a valued member of HUME! Because this closure is for facility upgrades and improvements to enhance the member experience, membership billing will continue as usual. We are unable to issue refunds or prorated fees for this time. This is standard practice, as memberships provide ongoing access to the club—not a guarantee that the facility will be open every day of the year. This structure allows us to reinvest in the facility and complete necessary work safely and to the standard our members expect.

We schedule renovation windows as rarely as possible and specifically during the lowest-usage period of the year to limit disruption. The work being completed cannot happen safely while members are in the space, and these windows ensure the club can maintain its quality long-term.

These improvements are a result of the feedback and requests we have received from members, and we are excited to be investing heavily into creating a better, more functional space. We can't wait for you to experience the updates when we reopen on January 2nd!

If there's anything else we can answer or support you with, please let us know.

Best,

The Team at HUME

title: Valet Information
content:
Hi X,

We have valet parking available on weekdays from 6am to 2pm and 5pm to 9pm, while weekend hours vary. Pricing is $5.50 for 2 hours with market pricing thereafter, which will be posted.

When valet is not available, there is on-site parking attached to the building on a first come first serve basis.

Additionally, there is typically street parking available on the surrounding streets.

Best,

The Team at HUME
